title: U.N. Sets Plan to Evacuate Stranded Ships Out of Persian Gulf
summary_full: The International Maritime Organization, working with multiple countries, said it has ensured that vessels can sail safely through the Strait of Hormuz after months of being idled.
summary_public: The International Maritime Organization, working with multiple countries, said it has ensured that vessels can sail safely through the Strait of Hormuz after months of being idled.
